app_tagline: Upload a CSV and query it with SQL. No more broken Excel macros.
about_description: Upload a CSV file and it is automatically registered in a DuckDB in-memory database. Write SQL queries, view results, download as CSV, or visualize with charts.
pain_point_description: Excel macros break, VLOOKUP formulas go wrong, and manual aggregation wastes hours every week. SQL is stable, readable, and reproducible.
no_file: Upload a CSV file to start querying with SQL.
chart_need_cols: Chart requires at least 2 columns in the result.
desktop_recommended: This app is optimized for desktop use
